---
title: "Manufacture bioinspired systems"
heading: "Additive manufacturing of multi-material architectures"
blurb: "Natural systems rarely rely on a single material. We create multi-material architectures inspired by the hierarchical organization of natural systems. Our additive manufacturing strategies combine distinct materials, chemistries, and structures within single objects to build edible, biomedical, and adaptive systems."
image: teaser.png
# pub_link: "publications/index.qmd#category=MAP"
date: 2024-01-03
---
